item.text: IвҖҷll add a rendering regression first: a small terminal, large agent output, and a multiline chat draft. The expected behavior is that both `chat> first draft` and the continuation line stay visible. Then IвҖҷll adjust row counting to treat embedded newlines as separate visual rows.

items.text: Add failing multiline prompt visibility regression
Fix visual row counting for embedded newlines
Run required checks and real-agent verification

item.text: IвҖҷm placing the visibility regression near the existing large-output prompt tests in `tests/terminal_app.rs`, since this is the same right-pane prompt visibility path.
IвҖҷm continuing from the row-count finding and keeping the scope tight: one regression around multiline prompt visibility, then the minimal counting fix in the UI helper.

I found the current helper exactly as reported: `visual_row_count` treats the whole prompt string as one line, and `visible_content` feeds it the multiline prompt block. IвҖҷm adding the regression beside the existing large-output prompt test so it exercises the app render path, not a private helper.
IвҖҷm going to make the test deliberately tight vertically, with enough transcript lines that the off-by-one prompt row count matters. It asserts the whole two-line draft is visible after rendering.
The regression is in place. IвҖҷm running just that test now to confirm it reproduces the reviewerвҖҷs reported clipping before touching the helper.

item.text: The focused test fails before the fix: the rendered frame shows `chat> first draft` but clips `second draft`. IвҖҷm changing the shared visual row helper to sum wrapped rows per embedded line break, preserving the existing wrap math for each line.
The helper is patched. IвҖҷm rerunning the focused regression first, then IвҖҷll run formatting and the required full validation set.

item.text: Real Codex verification returned the expected `WORK_LEAF_REAL_AGENT_OK`. IвҖҷm doing one final diff/status pass so the closeout is grounded in the exact files changed.

Implemented the reviewed fix and left changes uncommitted.

Changed [src/ui.rs](/home/user/src/work-leaf/.bench-tmp/work-leaf-3feature-worktree-bench.if2eWj/worktrees/feature-1/src/ui.rs:1865) so `visual_row_count` counts embedded `\n` as separate visual rows before computing right-pane history height. Added a regression in [tests/terminal_app.rs](/home/user/src/work-leaf/.bench-tmp/work-leaf-3feature-worktree-bench.if2eWj/worktrees/feature-1/tests/terminal_app.rs:593) that failed before the fix by clipping the second draft line, then passed after.

Validation run:
- `cargo fmt`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets --all-features`
- Real Codex smoke check returned `WORK_LEAF_REAL_AGENT_OK`

Docs were not changed because this fixes the existing visual prompt rendering behavior without changing the documented workflow.

items.text: Add failing multiline prompt visibility regression
